meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Advanced User Onboarding: Escaping the Basic App Trap
content.seo_description: Break out of the basic app loop. Learn how to architect professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first production-ready SaaS.
content.answer_block: Most student projects die because users don't understand the value proposition immediately. By implementing an event-driven onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment within seconds. This tutorial shows you how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to automate this architecture, turning simple prototypes into sticky, professional-grade SaaS applications.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks iterating on your project, yet your user metrics remain flat. You are trapped in the 'student app' valley of death—where your code works, but your users bounce because they feel lost the moment they land on your dashboard. It is a frustrating plateau, but it is also the most critical threshold in your development journey.

To move from hobbyist to professional, you must stop treating onboarding as a list of tooltips and start treating it as a strategic conversion funnel. This guide will show you how to architect a high-conversion onboarding experience that transforms casual observers into power users using modern AI-assisted workflows.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single action that delivers core value. Map this to a state-driven onboarding flow that prevents feature bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition of a SaaS dashboard. Generate a state machine design for a 3-step onboarding flow that forces users to perform the primary value-add task immediately.

steps.title: Architecting the Progressive Profile
steps.description: Avoid long signup forms. Implement progressive profiling to collect user data only when necessary to increase conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema for progressive user profiling that integrates with our authentication layer, ensuring we only capture essential data at the point of need.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/models/User.ts --instruction 'implement progressive profiling fields'

steps.title: Building Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use event-based triggers to show UI guidance only when a user interacts with a specific component for the first time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React component for contextual onboarding tooltips that hooks into our existing global event emitter.

steps.title: Implementing the Welcome Dashboard State
steps.description: Create a 'first-run' dashboard layout that highlights empty states with actionable CTA buttons instead of blank space.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor our main dashboard view to display a 'Getting Started' overlay if the user's onboarding completion status is false.

steps.title: Automated Onboarding Analytics
steps.description: Track drop-off points in your onboarding flow to identify where users are getting stuck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an instrumentation script that logs user progress through the onboarding steps to our analytics provider.

pro_tips: Never force a tutorial overlay on a power user; always include a 'Skip' button that saves state to the backend.
Use empty states as educational opportunities—if a table is empty, provide a button that creates sample data.
Keep your onboarding flow under 3 steps; psychological friction increases exponentially after the third interaction.
A/B test your onboarding CTA text; a small change from 'Start' to 'Build My First App' can double conversion.
Sync onboarding progress with your backend API to ensure that if a user refreshes, they pick up exactly where they left off.
resources: UX Collective Onboarding Best Practices: https://uxdesign.cc
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is live, deploy your changes to a staging environment and use tools like Hotjar to watch screen recordings of real users navigating your new flow to identify remaining friction points.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just writing code; you are building experiences. This onboarding framework is the difference between a project that gathers dust and one that gains traction. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
